cache = {}


def get_user_config(user_id: str) -> dict:
    config = cache.get(f"config:{user_id}")
    if config is None:
        config = fetch_config(user_id)
        cache[f"config:{user_id}"] = config
    return config


def get_settings(app_id: str) -> dict:
    settings = cache.get(f"settings:{app_id}")
    if settings is None:
        settings = load_settings(app_id)
        cache[f"settings:{app_id}"] = settings
    return settings
